sections.paragraph:
Original: סעד

Transliteration: sâ‛ad

Phonetic: saw-ad'

BDB Definition:

  1. to support, sustain, stay, establish, strengthen, comfort
    1. (Qal) to support, sustain
      1. to sustain, stay (of heart)
      2. to support, uphold (of throne)

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1525

Part(s) of speech: Verb
